target.title: fix(update): continue after package doctor warnings
target.body:
## Summary

- Downgrade completed nonzero package post-install `openclaw doctor --fix` results to an advisory update step after the package install has already been verified.
- Keep killed/timed-out doctor runs fatal so interrupted repairs do not continue into plugin convergence or gateway restart.
- Surface advisory doctor stderr in both live progress and printed update summaries, then continue into the fresh post-core update process.
- Fix the progress renderer typings for advisory doctor summary rows so the PR head passes the prod/test type gates.

## Verification

- `pnpm format:fix src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo:prod`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (clean: no accepted/actionable findings)
- Real package update proof from a packed branch tarball with a Node preload hook that forces only the post-install `doctor` child to exit nonzero while `OPENCLAW_UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS=1` is set.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Package updates continue past post-install doctor only for the dedicated exit code, a normally terminated child, and a valid typed deferred-configured-plugin-repair advisory. Unknown nonzero exits, missing or malformed results, killed runs, signals, and timeouts remain blocking.

Real environment tested: The prior packed-package macOS update proof remains from ancestor head 377924d03129cc97b094c1d2681148e37487e5f0. Current head 1b4e554876e00a673309c427007664075b731207 was tested in the isolated macOS PR worktree with Node 24.14.0 against upstream/main e3a6da0f518136a4277373afdf4b7f894c9e092f.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
env -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_KIND -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MARKER -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_VERSION -u OPENCLAW_SERVICE_MANAGED_ENV_KEYS -u OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_SERVICE_PID -u OPENCLAW_LAUNCHD_LABEL -u OPENCLAW_SYSTEMD_UNIT -u OPENCLAW_WINDOWS_TASK_NAME -u OPENCLAW_WRAPPER PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-pr-91586-vitest-final node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.test.ts src/infra/update-runner.test.ts src/commands/doctor/shared/release-configured-plugin-installs.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts
PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/openclaw-pr-91586-core-final.tsbuildinfo
PATH=/Users/jason/.nvm/versions/node/v24.14.0/bin:$PATH node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile /tmp/openclaw-pr-91586-core-test-final.tsbuildinfo
git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD
git merge-tree --write-tree upstream/main HEAD
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --codex-bin /Users/jason/.codex/openclaw-pr-autopilot/bin/codex-persist-sessions --model codex=kepler-alpha --thinking codex=high
```

Evidence after fix: The focused suite passed 254 tests across four Vitest shards. Core production and test type checks passed. git diff --check was clean. The current-main merge simulation was conflict-free and produced tree 4c911e4b96104d36ba153d36e13e433a9fd53ddc. Fresh persisted local and branch Kepler autoreviews reported no accepted/actionable findings.

Copied live output excerpt from the real packed-package updater run on ancestor 377924d03129cc97b094c1d2681148e37487e5f0:

```json
{
  "status": "ok",
  "mode": "npm",
  "doctor": {
    "name": "openclaw doctor",
    "exitCode": 86,
    "advisory": { "kind": "package-post-install-doctor" },
    "stderrTail": "Skipped package-manager repair for configured plugin discord during package update; rerun openclaw doctor --fix after the update completes."
  },
  "postUpdatePluginsStatus": "warning"
}
```
Observed result after fix: The typed advisory gate still authorizes only the intended recoverable doctor result and continues into post-core plugin convergence. Additional current-head regressions prove mixed-type malformed payloads fail closed, appended diagnostics stay within the existing log-tail bound, --no-restart output does not promise a gateway restart, and the advisory IPC result is created owner-only and exclusively so a pre-existing path fails closed.

What was not tested: Current head did not rerun the packed-package real update or a managed gateway restart. The prior real package success proof remains attributable to ancestor 377924d03129cc97b094c1d2681148e37487e5f0. The prior Testbox Docker restart lane remained blocked before lane start by organization access. No Crabbox or Mantis lane was run for these deterministic hardening changes.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
